FAILUsers can be listedConnectAs a Posit Team administratorsrc/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py::test_list_users0.31sTest procedureGiven Connect is accessible at the configured URLWhen I list all usersThen the user list is not emptyAnd the test user exists in the user listError tracebackCopyfixturefunc = <function check_test_user_in_list at 0x7f2a8ca8f920>
request = <FixtureRequest for <Function test_list_users>>
kwargs = {'test_username': 'testuser', 'user_list': [{'active_time': '2026-05-11T15:34:23Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-05-11T15:32:36Z', 'email': '', ...}]}

    def call_fixture_func(
        fixturefunc: _FixtureFunc[FixtureValue], request: FixtureRequest, kwargs
    ) -> FixtureValue:
        if inspect.isgeneratorfunction(fixturefunc):
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., Generator[FixtureValue]], fixturefunc)
            generator = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
            try:
                fixture_result = next(generator)
            except StopIteration:
                raise ValueError(f"{request.fixturename} did not yield a value") from None
            finalizer = functools.partial(_teardown_yield_fixture, fixturefunc, generator)
            request.addfinalizer(finalizer)
        else:
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., FixtureValue], fixturefunc)
>           fixture_result = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
                             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

.venv/lib/python3.13/site-packages/_pytest/fixtures.py:915: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _

test_username = 'testuser'

    @then("the test user exists in the user list")
    def check_test_user_in_list(user_list, test_username):
        expected = test_username.split("@", 1)[0]
        usernames = [u.get("username") for u in user_list]
>       assert expected in usernames, (
            f"Test user {expected!r} (from {test_username!r}) not found in user list: {usernames}"
        )

E       assert 'testuser' in ['__bootstrap_admin__']

2026/05/11 15:36:00.514048971 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514055511 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514085356 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514086107 useKerning, fillOddEven, compress)
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514104295 {
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514105056 initPSandPDFfonts()
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514117014 new <- list()
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514117835 if (!missing(width))
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514130494 new$width <- width
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514131235 if (!missing(height))
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514144605 new$height <- height
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514145386 if (!missing(onefile))
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514159087 new$onefile <- onefile
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514161631 if (!missing(title))
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514175051 new$title <- title
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514175852 if (!missing(fonts))
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514188761 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514189472 if (!missing(version))
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514204675 new$version <- version
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514205486 if (!missing(paper))
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514218857 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514219598 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514229272 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514239948 if (!missing(bg))
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514240739 new$bg <- bg
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514252938 if (!missing(fg))
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514253679 new$fg <- fg
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514267880 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514268581 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514282592 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514283283 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514307690 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514317655 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514318456 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514333148 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514333909 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514348321 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514349192 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514366488 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514367169 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514381311 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514382032 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514413509 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514427290 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514428131 enc <- family$encoding
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514442953 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514443684 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514462753 "default"))
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514463454 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514476764 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514477525 }
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514489133 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514490364 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514518967 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514536243 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514546519 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514565657 }
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514566449 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514599318 }
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514600039 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514616344 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514617085 if (is.null(pf))
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514659043 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514673875 domain = NA)
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514697901 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514705102 }
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514725743 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514726634 old$family <- family
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514742513 }
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514744116 version <- old$version
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514757706 versions <- c("1.1", "1.2", "1.3", "1.4", "1.5", "1.6", "1.7",
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514758667 "2.0")

2026/05/11 15:36:00.514806960 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514808072 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514823375 if (!checkIntFormat(file))
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514824196 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514842704 domain = NA)
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514843445 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514859539 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514860270 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514881206 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514882739 old$fillOddEven, old$compress)
2026/05/11 15:36:00.514909915 invisible()
